creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
Could you please provide the contents of /etc/make.conf, if it exists?

Could you also provide the *full* build log?

We have been unable to reproduce this, despite many similar reports.

On my system, textproc/xmlcatmgr is listed as a dependency:

 gjb@nucleus:/usr/ports/textproc/docproj % make all-depends-list | grep xmlcatmgr
 /usr/ports/textproc/xmlcatmgr
